title: Add WIKIMEDIA image
user_story:
As an API contributor\
I want to add WIKIMEDIA images just by their IDs\
So I don't have to fill out all fields manually
description:
* the existing “create node” functionality is extended (see <https://dennis-gerike.atlassian.net/browse/MCA-75>)
* there are already multiple IMAGE fields prepared → they have to be filled with real data → data is to be fetched via the official WIKIMEDIA API
* the WIKIMEDIA image node is successfully created when the user provided valid data and the image was found in the Wikimedia API → Status Code \`201\`
* malformed requests are rejected → status code \`400\`
  * same validation rules as before
  * plus: `wikimedia` is added as a valid value for the `image_provider` field
* requests are rejected when there exists no Wikimedia image with the provided ID → Status Code \`422\`
* requests are rejected when there already exists an IMAGE node with the provided ID → Status Code \`409\`
